summary: First test iteration for YTWC marketing site. Ran pytest against backend contact APIs (5/5 pass) and executed Playwright checks across Home, Service pages (corporate-film-production, drone-photography-videography), Location, Portfolio, Contact form, Blog hub, and single Blog post. All critical flows work — contact form submission returns success toast, persists to Mongo (verified via GET /api/contact), and resets form. Exactly one H1 per page on all tested pages. Header nav, dropdown, breadcrumbs, floating WhatsApp button, FAQ accordions all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/contact accepts submissions but has no rate limiting / spam protection; consider basic honeypot or rate-limit if this is publicly exposed.
Contact model uses ISO string for created_at while StatusCheck uses datetime — inconsistent serialization approach across models (minor).

server.py logger is defined AFTER it is used inside create_contact (declaration is at line 115 while used at line 72). Because Python resolves names at call-time this works, but it is fragile — move logging.basicConfig / logger definition above route handlers.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contact submissions via API during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 pages routing works. data-testid coverage is good. Contact form POST → GET verification passes. Note: when navigating with page.click() in SPA, wait_for_selector after navigation before asserting H1 (React needs a moment to mount new route). Backend contact endpoint returns Contact with UUID id and echoes fields; email validated via EmailStr (422 on invalid).
